question: What is the main feature of this image? Select from the following options: (A) A sailboat on its side in the ocean at sunset. (B) A sailboat in the water with the sun over the ocean and rocks. (C) A broken sailboat resting on a rocky shore during sunset. (D) A rocky shore with a sailboat in the distance at sunrise.
gold_answer: A sailboat on its side in the ocean at sunset
answer_choices: A sailboat on its side in the ocean at sunset
A sailboat in the water with the sun over the ocean and rocks
A broken sailboat resting on a rocky shore during sunset
A rocky shore with a sailboat in the distance at sunrise
